entry.title: Abstract API
entry.description: Abstract API offers simple, scalable APIs for common developer needs like IP geolocation, email validation, and more.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly requests for each API endpoint.
caveats: Some APIs may have stricter limits
No guaranteed uptime or support on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Abstract API account.
Select the API you want to use from the dashboard.
Copy your unique API key.
Read the API documentation for endpoint details.
Make requests using your API key and review responses.
entry.whenToUse: Use Abstract API when you need quick, reliable validation or enrichment APIs without managing infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need high request volumes, enterprise SLAs, or on-premise deployment options.
entry.body: Abstract API provides a suite of plug-and-play APIs for common developer needs, with a generous free tier suitable for testing and small projects.

entry.title: Apify
entry.description: Apify provides cloud-based web scraping, automation, and data extraction tools with a generous free tier for small-scale projects.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes $5 monthly platform credits for running actors and storing data.
caveats: Overages require payment or subscription upgrade
Some advanced actors may exceed free credits quickly
billingRiskNotes: No charges unless you upgrade or exceed free limits

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Apify account at apify.com.
Create a new actor or select a template from the Apify Store.
Configure input settings for your target website or workflow.
Run the actor and monitor progress in the Apify console.
Download or export extracted data in your preferred format.
entry.whenToUse: Use Apify when you need to automate web data extraction or scraping without managing your own infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Apify for projects requiring high-volume scraping, custom browser automation, or if you need on-premise deployment.
entry.body: Apify offers a cloud platform for web scraping and automation, providing a free tier suitable for learning, prototyping, and small data extraction tasks.

entry.title: APITemplate.io
entry.description: APITemplate.io automates document and image generation via API using customizable templates.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 50 API credits per month for PDF or image generation.

useCases: Dynamic image creation for social media
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free APITemplate.io account.
Create a new template for PDF or image generation.
Configure template variables and design.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Send a test API request using your template and API key.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to automate document or image creation from templates via API without building your own rendering service.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited or high-volume generation, or need on-premise deployment for sensitive data.
entry.body: APITemplate.io offers a simple API for generating PDFs and images from customizable templates, ideal for automating document workflows and dynamic content creation.

entry.title: Azure API Management
entry.description: Azure API Management enables organizations to publish, secure, transform, and monitor APIs at scale.

freeTierDetails.summary: Developer tier offers free usage for evaluation and development.

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal.
Create a new API Management instance using the Developer tier.
Add your API or import an OpenAPI specification.
Configure policies for security, rate limiting, or transformation.
Publish the API and access the developer portal.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to centralize, secure, and monitor APIs for development or evaluation purposes.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for production workloads or if you require SLA-backed uptime and support.
entry.body: Azure API Management provides a centralized platform for managing, securing, and monitoring APIs, with a free Developer tier suitable for non-production use.

entry.title: CarAPI.dev
entry.description: CarAPI.dev provides a free REST API for vehicle data, including makes, models, trims, and specifications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited API requests per month for vehicle data queries.
limits: Access to basic vehicle data endpoints
caveats: Advanced endpoints and higher limits require paid plans

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free CarAPI.dev account.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Read the API documentation for endpoint details.
Make your first API request using your key.
Integrate API responses into your application.
entry.whenToUse: Use CarAPI.dev when you need basic vehicle data for apps, forms, or prototypes with low to moderate API usage.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need high request volumes, advanced data, or guaranteed uptime for production-critical automotive services.
entry.body: CarAPI.dev offers a simple REST API for retrieving vehicle makes, models, and specifications, ideal for prototypes and educational projects with modest data needs.

entry.title: Compare JSON
entry.description: Compare JSON is a free online tool for visually comparing and diffing two JSON files or objects.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free, unlimited online JSON comparison with no registration required.
caveats: Large files may slow down or fail

useCases: Spot differences between two JSON files
quickstartSteps: Go to https://comparejson.com.
Paste or upload your first JSON object in the left pane.
Paste or upload your second JSON object in the right pane.
Click the 'Compare' button to view differences.
Review highlighted changes in the visual diff.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a quick, visual comparison of two JSON files or API responses without installing software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need to compare very large files, automate comparisons, or require offline or private processing.
entry.body: Compare JSON is a free, browser-based tool for visually comparing two JSON objects or files, ideal for quick debugging and data validation tasks.

entry.title: CraftMyPDF
entry.description: Generate PDF documents from templates and data using a REST API or no-code integrations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 50 PDF document generations per month.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free CraftMyPDF account.
Create a new PDF template using the visual editor.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Send a POST request to the API with your template and data.
Download the generated PDF from the response.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to automate PDF creation from templates and structured data via API or no-code tools.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited document generation, advanced template features, or full on-premise deployment.
entry.body: CraftMyPDF enables users to generate PDF documents from templates and data using a simple API or no-code integrations, with a generous free tier for light usage.

entry.title: FabForm
entry.description: FabForm provides simple, backend-free form handling for static websites with spam protection and email notifications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan allows basic form submissions with spam filtering and email notifications.
caveats: No file uploads on free plan
Limited to one form per account

useCases: Collecting contact form submissions on static sites
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free FabForm account.
Create a new form in the FabForm dashboard.
Copy the provided form endpoint URL.
Add the endpoint to your HTML form's action attribute.
Deploy your static site and test form submissions.
entry.whenToUse: Use FabForm when you need quick, backend-free form handling for static or JAMstack sites with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced workflows, file uploads, or need to handle high submission volumes.
entry.body: FabForm is a no-code backend for handling form submissions on static websites, offering spam filtering and email notifications with a generous free tier.

entry.title: FluidForms
entry.description: FluidForms provides AI-powered form generation and data collection tools for websites and apps.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic form creation and limited monthly submissions.
caveats: Branding may be present on free forms

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a FluidForms account.
Create a new form using the AI-powered builder.
Customize form fields and appearance.
Embed the form on your website or share the link.
Monitor submissions from the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use FluidForms when you need to quickly create and deploy forms with minimal coding or AI-assisted field suggestions.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited forms, advanced integrations, or full white-labeling without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: FluidForms offers an easy way to generate and manage AI-powered forms for collecting data, feedback, or leads, suitable for small projects and quick deployments.

entry.title: Form.taxi
entry.description: Form.taxi provides a free, no-backend form endpoint for static sites and JAMstack projects.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows basic form submissions with email notifications.
caveats: No custom domains on free tier

useCases: Collecting contact form submissions on static sites
quickstartSteps: Go to https://form.taxi/ and register your email address.
Create a form on your static site with the action set to your Form.taxi endpoint.
Deploy your site and test the form submission.
Check your email inbox for form submission notifications.
entry.whenToUse: Use Form.taxi when you need a quick, backend-free way to handle form submissions on static or JAMstack sites.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced workflows, high submission volumes, or custom domains without upgrading.
entry.body: Form.taxi is a simple, always-free form backend service for static sites, enabling easy form handling and email notifications without server-side code.

entry.title: FormatJSONOnline.com
entry.description: A free online tool to format, validate, and beautify JSON instantly in your browser.

freeTierDetails.summary: Completely free with no registration or usage limits.

quickstartSteps: Go to https://formatjsononline.com in your browser.
Paste or type your JSON into the input box.
Click the 'Format' button to beautify and validate your JSON.
Copy the formatted JSON output as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly format or validate JSON without installing software or creating an account.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need offline access, API integration, or to process sensitive data requiring privacy guarantees.
avoidIf: you handle sensitive or private data
entry.body: FormatJSONOnline.com is a free, browser-based tool for formatting and validating JSON, ideal for quick debugging and readability improvements without any signup.

entry.title: Formcarry.com
entry.description: Formcarry lets you collect form submissions from static sites without backend code or server setup.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 100 submissions/month and basic spam protection.
caveats: No file uploads on free tier

useCases: Collecting contact form submissions on static sites
Quickly adding forms to JAMstack projects
Handling feedback forms without backend setup
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Formcarry account.
Create a new form in the Formcarry dashboard.
Copy the generated form endpoint URL.
Update your HTML form's action attribute to use the Formcarry endpoint.
Test your form to ensure submissions are received in your dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Formcarry when you need to collect form submissions on static or JAMstack sites without building a backend.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced workflows, file uploads, or high submission volumes without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Formcarry provides a simple backend for HTML forms, ideal for static sites and quick prototypes, with a generous free tier for basic needs.

entry.title: Formester.com
entry.description: Formester.com lets you quickly create, host, and manage online forms with no-code tools and integrations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes basic form creation and up to 100 submissions per month.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Formester account.
Create a new form using the drag-and-drop builder.
Customize form fields and design as needed.
Publish the form and share the link or embed it on your site.
Monitor responses from the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Formester when you need to quickly create and deploy online forms without coding or server setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced logic, unlimited submissions, or full white-labeling on the free plan.
entry.body: Formester.com is a user-friendly, no-code form builder ideal for simple data collection, surveys, and event registrations with a generous free tier.

entry.title: FormKeep.com
entry.description: FormKeep provides form endpoints for static sites, handling submissions without server-side code.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan allows 50 submissions per month for one form.
caveats: No file uploads on free tier

useCases: Collect contact form submissions on static sites
Integrate simple forms into JAMstack projects
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free FormKeep account.
Create a new form in the FormKeep dashboard.
Copy the provided form endpoint URL.
Replace your HTML form's action attribute with the FormKeep endpoint.
Test your form to ensure submissions are received in your FormKeep dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use FormKeep when you need to collect form submissions on static or JAMstack sites without building a backend.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced workflows, file uploads, or high submission volumes on the free tier.
entry.body: FormKeep is a no-code form backend service for static sites, offering a simple way to collect submissions without server-side development.

entry.title: Forms.app
entry.description: Forms.app lets you easily create online forms, surveys, and quizzes with drag-and-drop tools and templates.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan allows basic form creation and limited responses per month.

Click 'Create Form' and choose a template or start from scratch.
Drag and drop fields to build your form.
Customize settings and appearance as needed.
Share your form link or embed it on your website.
entry.whenToUse: Use Forms.app when you need to quickly create simple forms, surveys, or quizzes without coding.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced logic, unlimited responses, or white-label branding without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Forms.app offers a user-friendly way to build and share online forms, surveys, and quizzes with a generous free tier for basic needs.

entry.title: Formspark.io

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 250 submissions per month and basic spam protection.
caveats: No file uploads on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Formspark account.
Create a new form in the dashboard.
Copy the generated form endpoint URL.
Add the endpoint to your HTML form's action attribute.
Test your form by submitting a sample entry.
entry.whenToUse: Use Formspark when you need to quickly handle form submissions without building a backend or server.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced workflows, file uploads, or high submission volumes on the free tier.
entry.body: Formspark.io offers a simple, no-code backend for handling HTML form submissions, ideal for static sites and quick prototypes without server setup.

entry.title: Formspree.io
entry.description: Formspree.io lets you easily add forms to static sites and receive submissions without backend code.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 50 form submissions per month with basic email notifications.

useCases: Collect contact form submissions on static sites
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Formspree account.
Create a new form in the Formspree dashboard.
Copy the generated form endpoint URL.
Add the Formspree endpoint to your HTML form's action attribute.
Test your form by submitting a sample entry.
entry.whenToUse: Use Formspree when you need to quickly add forms to static or JAMstack sites without building a backend.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high submission volumes, file uploads, or advanced integrations on the free tier.

entry.title: Formsubmit.co
entry.description: Formsubmit.co lets you collect form submissions via email without backend code or server setup.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free for up to 50 form submissions per month with basic features.
caveats: No file attachments in free tier

quickstartSteps: Create an HTML form with your email address in the action attribute (e.g., action="https://formsubmit.co/your@email.com").
Add required form fields and a submit button.
Publish your form on your website.
Submit a test entry to verify email delivery.
Optionally, confirm your email address to unlock additional features.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly collect form submissions by email without building a backend or managing servers.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need file uploads, advanced automation, or expect high submission volumes beyond the free tier.
entry.body: Formsubmit.co is a no-code tool for sending web form submissions directly to your email, ideal for simple sites and prototypes without backend infrastructure.

entry.title: Formware.io
entry.description: Formware.io provides a simple backend for handling form submissions and notifications without server-side code.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows basic form submissions with limited monthly quota.
caveats: No file uploads on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Formware.io account.
Create a new form endpoint in the dashboard.
Copy the generated endpoint URL.
Add the endpoint URL to your website form's action attribute.
Test your form and check submissions in the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Formware.io when you need to handle form submissions on static sites or without building a backend.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced workflows, file uploads, or high submission volumes without upgrading.
entry.body: Formware.io offers a plug-and-play backend for web forms, ideal for static sites or quick projects needing simple submission handling without server setup.

entry.title: FreeIPAPI
entry.description: FreeIPAPI provides a simple API for IP geolocation and related network information.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 10,000 requests per month with basic geolocation data.
caveats: Advanced data fields require paid plan

useCases: Block or allow traffic by country
Display user IP info in dashboards
quickstartSteps: Go to https://freeipapi.com.
Review API documentation for endpoint details.
Make a GET request to https://freeipapi.com/api/json/ using your preferred HTTP client.
Parse the JSON response for geolocation data.
Integrate the API call into your application logic.
entry.whenToUse: Use FreeIPAPI when you need basic, free IP geolocation for low to moderate traffic apps or prototypes.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need high request volumes, advanced geolocation data, or guaranteed uptime for production-critical services.
entry.body: FreeIPAPI offers a simple, no-auth API for basic IP geolocation, ideal for small projects or prototypes needing quick location data.

entry.title: Geekflare API
entry.description: Geekflare API offers free tools for website performance, security, and SEO checks via simple HTTP endpoints.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited daily API calls for website analysis and testing.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Geekflare account.
Log in and navigate to the API dashboard.
Generate your API key.
Review available endpoints and limits.
Make requests using your API key and preferred HTTP client.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need quick, automated website performance, security, or SEO checks with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high request volumes, advanced analytics, or guaranteed uptime for critical production workflows.
entry.body: Geekflare API provides a set of free tools for developers to automate website performance, security, and SEO checks, ideal for prototyping and learning.

entry.title: Gemini API
entry.description: Google Cloud's Gemini API provides access to advanced generative AI models for text, code, and multimodal tasks.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier offers limited monthly usage of Gemini Pro and Gemini Pro Vision models.
limits: Up to 2,000,000 tokens/month for Gemini Pro
Up to 60,000 tokens/month for Gemini Pro Vision
caveats: Usage above free tier is billed.
Some models or features may not be included.

quickstartSteps: Sign in to Google Cloud and enable the Gemini API in your project.
Create or select a service account with appropriate permissions.
Obtain an API key or set up OAuth credentials.
Install the Google AI SDK or use the REST API.
Make your first API call using sample code from the documentation.
entry.whenToUse: Use Gemini API when you need scalable, managed access to Google's latest generative AI models for text or multimodal tasks.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premise deployment, strict data residency, or need unlimited free usage for high-volume workloads.
entry.body: Gemini API provides developers with access to Google's advanced generative AI models for building applications that require text, code, or multimodal understanding. The free tier is suitable for experimentation, prototyping, and low-volume production use, with clear monthly limits and no risk of surprise overages. Integration is straightforward via REST or SDK, and the service is ideal for teams looking to quickly add AI capabilities without managing infrastructure.

entry.title: Generative AI API
entry.description: Google Cloud's Generative AI API provides access to large language models for text, chat, and code generation.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly usage of select models for prototyping and evaluation.
caveats: Usage beyond free tier is billed per token
billingRiskNotes: Hard cap prevents unexpected charges unless explicitly enabled

quickstartSteps: Sign in to Google Cloud and enable the Generative AI API.
Create or select a Google Cloud project.
Enable billing (no card required for free tier).
Obtain an API key or set up authentication.
Install the client library or use REST endpoints.
Make your first API call to generate text.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need quick, scalable access to Google's large language models for prototyping or light production workloads.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited usage, advanced models not in the free tier, or strict on-premise deployment.
entry.body: Google Cloud's Generative AI API offers developers access to advanced language models for text, chat, and code generation, with a generous free tier for experimentation and prototyping.

entry.title: HeyForm.net
entry.description: HeyForm.net lets you create and share online forms and surveys with no coding required.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan allows basic form creation and limited responses.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free HeyForm.net account.
Create a new form using the drag-and-drop builder.
Customize questions and design as needed.
Publish and share your form link.
View and export responses from your dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use HeyForm.net when you need to quickly create and share simple forms or surveys without coding.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations, high response volumes, or full white-labeling.
entry.body: HeyForm.net is a no-code form builder for creating and sharing online forms and surveys, ideal for simple data collection and feedback.

entry.title: Hugging Face Inference API
entry.description: Provides hosted inference for popular machine learning models via a simple API endpoint.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes limited monthly inference for hosted models.
caveats: Some models and features require paid plans
Performance may be lower on free tier

useCases: Integrating AI features into small apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Hugging Face account.
Navigate to the Inference API section on the Hugging Face website.
Select a public model and copy its Inference API endpoint.
Generate an access token from your account settings.
Make API requests using the endpoint and your token.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need quick, hosted access to popular ML models for prototyping or light workloads without managing infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need high-throughput, custom models, or guaranteed performance for production-scale applications.
entry.body: Hugging Face Inference API offers a simple way to access and run inference on a wide range of pre-trained machine learning models without managing infrastructure. The free tier is ideal for experimentation, learning, and prototyping, but is limited in compute time and model selection. For production workloads or custom models, consider upgrading to a paid plan or self-hosting.

entry.title: IBM API Connect
entry.description: IBM API Connect is a platform for creating, managing, securing, and analyzing APIs across cloud and on-premises environments.

freeTierDetails.summary: 30-day free trial with access to API management features.
limits: Up to 50,000 API calls per month
billingRiskNotes: No charges during trial; service stops after trial ends unless upgraded

quickstartSteps: Sign up for an IBM Cloud account.
Navigate to API Connect in the IBM Cloud catalog.
Provision an API Connect Lite instance.
Create and publish your first API using the management dashboard.
Test the API endpoint and review analytics.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to manage, secure, and monitor APIs with enterprise-grade features and analytics.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need a permanent free tier or are building small projects with minimal API management needs.
entry.body: IBM API Connect offers a robust platform for API lifecycle management, including creation, security, analytics, and developer engagement, suitable for enterprise use.

entry.title: Imgur API
entry.description: Imgur API enables developers to upload, manage, and share images programmatically on the Imgur platform.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows limited API usage for uploading and managing images.

useCases: Host images for blogs or forums
quickstartSteps: Register for a free Imgur account.
Create an application in the Imgur dashboard to obtain a Client ID and secret.
Read the API documentation to understand authentication and endpoints.
Use your Client ID to authenticate API requests.
Test uploading an image using the API.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a simple, reliable way to host and share images via API with generous free limits.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require video hosting, advanced image processing, or need guaranteed uptime for critical production workloads.
entry.body: Imgur API provides a straightforward way to upload, manage, and share images, making it ideal for lightweight apps, prototypes, and community-driven projects. The free tier is generous for most non-commercial use cases, but strict rate limits and lack of advanced features may limit suitability for high-volume or enterprise scenarios.

entry.title: IP Geolocation API
entry.description: Provides IP-based geolocation data such as country, city, and timezone for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Up to 20,000 requests per month are free.
caveats: Advanced data fields require paid plan

useCases: Blocking or allowing traffic by region
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free AbstractAPI account.
Navigate to the IP Geolocation API dashboard.
Copy your unique API key.
Send a GET request to the API endpoint with your API key and target IP address.
Parse the JSON response for location data.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly determine user location from IP for personalization, analytics, or access control.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need highly accurate, real-time location or must process more than 20,000 requests monthly without paying.
entry.body: AbstractAPI's IP Geolocation API offers a generous free tier for basic location lookup needs, making it suitable for small projects and prototyping. It is easy to integrate and provides standard geolocation fields, but advanced data and higher request volumes require a paid plan.

entry.title: IP Geolocation API by ipwho.org
entry.description: A free API for retrieving IP-based geolocation data including country, city, timezone, and more.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 10,000 requests per month with basic geolocation data.

useCases: Blocking or allowing traffic by country
quickstartSteps: Go to https://ipwho.org/ and review API documentation.
Copy the sample API endpoint URL for free usage.
Make a GET request to the endpoint with an IP address parameter.
Parse the JSON response for geolocation data in your application.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need basic, free IP geolocation for small projects or prototypes without requiring HTTPS or advanced data.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need secure HTTPS endpoints, advanced geolocation fields, or high request volumes for production workloads.
entry.body: IP Geolocation API by ipwho.org offers a simple, free way to retrieve geolocation data for IP addresses, suitable for low-volume or prototype use cases.

entry.title: ip-api
entry.description: ip-api provides a simple API for IP geolocation and related network information.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 45 HTTP requests per minute from one IP address.
caveats: No HTTPS support on free tier
Usage from multiple IPs may be rate-limited

quickstartSteps: Visit https://ip-api.com/docs to review API endpoints and usage.
Choose the endpoint (e.g., /json/{IP}) for your use case.
Make a simple HTTP GET request to the endpoint using your preferred tool or code.
Parse the JSON response to extract geolocation or network data.
Respect the 45 requests/minute/IP limit to avoid being blocked.
entry.whenToUse: Use ip-api when you need basic, fast IP geolocation or network info with minimal setup and no account required.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need HTTPS, higher request volumes, or guaranteed uptime for production workloads.
entry.body: ip-api offers a fast, no-signup IP geolocation API suitable for basic location detection and network info, with a generous free tier for low-volume use.

entry.title: ipapi
entry.description: ipapi provides a fast API for IP geolocation, timezone, and related data enrichment.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 1,000 requests per day with basic geolocation data.
caveats: No HTTPS support on free plan
Advanced data fields require paid plan

quickstartSteps: Go to https://ipapi.co/ and sign up for a free account.
Review the API documentation for endpoint usage and response formats.
Copy your API key from the dashboard (optional for free tier).
Make a GET request to https://ipapi.co/{ip}/json/ to retrieve geolocation data.
Integrate the API call into your application as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use ipapi when you need quick, simple IP geolocation or timezone data for low-traffic projects or prototypes.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require HTTPS, advanced data fields, or high request volumes without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: ipapi offers a simple, fast API for IP address geolocation and timezone lookup, ideal for basic enrichment and prototyping with a generous free tier.

entry.title: JSON IP
entry.description: A simple API to get your public IP address in JSON format.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free, no-auth API for public IP lookup.
caveats: Service may be rate-limited or blocked if abused

useCases: Detect client IP in web apps
quickstartSteps: Go to https://getjsonip.com in your browser or use curl.
Receive your public IP in JSON format.
Integrate the API endpoint into your app or script as needed.
